name: Baked Sweet Pepper Wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Lightly oil a 13 x 9 pan.
3. Trim the tops off the peppers and discard the stems. Finely chop the tops. Cut the peppers lengthwise into sixths, placing the wedges cut side up in the oiled pan.
4. In a bowl, combine the chopped pepper tops, onion, crushed tomatoes, parsley, 1/4 cup of olive oil, pine nuts, garlic, salt, and pepper. Stir well to mix.
5. Spoon the mixture into the pepper wedges.
6. Bake for 25 - 30 minutes, or until just tender.
7. Sprinkle bread crumbs and the remaining 2 tablespoons of olive oil over the wedges.
8. Continue baking for an additional 10 minutes.
9. Serve warm.
